name: mios_kargs_diagnosis
description: Structured output for diagnosing a kargs.d issue or proposing a kargs change.

suggested_filename.description: Recommended filename for placement under usr/lib/bootc/kargs.d/, e.g. '50-mios-vfio.toml'.

suggested_toml.description: Corrected TOML body (flat top-level kargs array).

verification_command.description: Single shell command the user runs after rebuild to verify the kargs took effect.
